Netflix (NFLX) vs. Disney (DIS): AI's Choice for 2026
Proposed acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery by Paramount Skydance - Wikipedia

summary: Netflix ad revenue doubled to $1.5B in 2025, guiding to double again in 2026; content hits (KPop Demon Hunters 325M views, Happy Gilmore 2 126M). WBD's board approved Paramount Skydance's $110.9B offer over Netflix's bid. Disney Q1 FY2026 revenue $25.98B +5.2% YoY; projects $24B content spend for FY2026. Netflix has cleaner strategic focus vs. Disney's complexity across parks, streaming, ESPN DTC.
